query: I need an AWS architecture diagram with EC2 instances, an S3 bucket, Lambda functions, and an RDS database — use the actual AWS icons if you can

generate an excalidraw file with Azure icons showing our setup — App Service, Cosmos DB, Azure Functions, and Blob Storage
I need a network diagram using cloud icons — show the VPC with public and private subnets, NAT gateway, internet gateway, and the EC2 instances in each subnet

draw a simple flowchart showing our user registration process — signup form, email verification, account creation, welcome email
